criteria.name: Discovery Coverage
criteria.description: Covers all sections: Team & Context, Goals & Priorities, Working Preferences, Expectations.

criteria.name: Accurate Capture
criteria.description: Records information accurately. Does not infer or assume — asks instead.

criteria.name: Validation
criteria.description: Summarizes and validates understanding frequently: 'Let me make sure I have this right...'

criteria.name: Follow-Up Tasks
criteria.description: Creates onboarding follow-up tasks via kutana_create_task with clear owners and timelines.

criteria.name: Discovery Report
criteria.description: Posts comprehensive discovery report covering team overview, goals, preferences, expectations, next steps.

criteria.name: Professional Tone
criteria.description: Professional, warm, respectful. Does not make promises or commitments on behalf of the organization.
